name: Balgrimmor
personality: This crown-wearing dragon with wide ◉ eyes treats every sprint like a dare, deploying features at a pace that makes the changelog look like a fever dream. Ask it why the architecture looks the way it does and it will stare at you with genuine bafflement — there was no plan, there is only velocity.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
